title: Exhaustive NAND direct-wire small-model audit configuration
purpose: Configure a bounded exhaustive small-model replay over NAND direct-wire words so the executable semantics is checked against truth tables, replacement equivalence, and brute-force minimum sizes inside the configured universe.
checks: truth-table classes have brute-force minimum size inside the configured universe
every generated word is no smaller than the class minimum
equivalent same-boundary words accept compatible replacement
non-equivalent same-boundary words reject compatible replacement
